_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: only the iHSC1λ cells showed increased activated β-catenin
details: Showed increased activated β-catenin in iHSC1λ cells overexpressing CTNNB1 S33Y but not in iHSC2λ cells
